name: carl-tools
description: Skills for multi-agent workflows, PR automation, product analysis, and more.

plugins.name: pre-mortem
plugins.description: Multi-agent project pre-mortem (Gary Klein technique). Spawns parallel agents with different failure-finding mandates, synthesizes into ranked risks with mitigations.

plugins.name: profile-me
plugins.description: Build a portable AI profile from your digital footprint. Produces personal/professional portraits, a working-with-me guide, and a compact system prompt for any AI assistant.

plugins.name: second-opinions
plugins.description: Validate decisions with a different AI model. Detects available LLM CLIs and routes to the best one. Use for critical code reviews, design decisions, and pre-merge validation.

plugins.name: handle-pr
plugins.description: Autonomously handle GitHub PR review comments: evaluate each thread, implement HIGH/MEDIUM changes, run tests, Copilot quality pass, commit, reply to every thread, then watch for follow-up comments for 12 minutes.

plugins.name: chezmoi-drift
plugins.description: Audit chezmoi-managed dotfiles for drift, unmanaged files worth tracking, and broken Claude/Codex shared-skill installs.

plugins.name: trust-audit
plugins.description: Audit whether a product will feel trustworthy, creepy, deceptive, or unsafe to users — across permissions, privacy, billing, file mutation, and silent-failure surfaces.

plugins.name: support-storm
plugins.description: Simulate support emails, reviews, refunds, and confused complaints a launch or feature change will generate, then identify the product fixes that cut maintenance drag.

plugins.name: first-contact
plugins.description: Red-team a product's onboarding, permissions, activation, and first-success experience to find where new users get confused, think the app is broken, or abandon setup.

plugins.name: wifi-qr
plugins.description: Generate a WiFi QR code PNG phones can scan to join a network instantly. Self-contained uv script, no pre-installed packages needed.

plugins.name: parallel-isolated-app-testing
plugins.description: Design and run parallel isolated testing for desktop apps, menu bar apps, and local tools with shared state — maps collision surfaces, defines isolated launch contracts, creates fixture profiles, and splits non-colliding test lanes.

plugins.name: kindness-check
plugins.description: Review code through four empathy lenses — user, machine, developer, support — to surface quality issues that pure technical review misses. Finds what makes users uninstall, machines overheat, developers quit, and support people burn out.
